title: Light-Field (Plenoptic) Imaging
source_data_quality_note: Source MD is widefield-fluorescence template (fan-out artifact). Physics below is grounded in Levoy-Hanrahan 1996 light-field rendering and Ng-Lytro 2005 plenoptic camera.

E.description: A plenoptic camera samples the 4D light field L(u,v,s,t) (spatial x angular) via a main lens + microlens array (MLA) or a camera array. Each microlens projects the pupil onto an (s,t) sub-image; the 4D LF supports refocusing at any depth z via shear-integration and sub-aperture view synthesis.
E.forward_model: I(u,v) = iint L(u - a*s, v - a*t, s, t) ds dt  (projection at slope a => depth z = f/a)
E.world_state_x: 4D light field L(u,v,s,t) in R^{H x W x U x V}; equivalently a continuous 3D scene {color, opacity} visible from a viewpoint cloud
E.observation_y: 2D sensor mosaic y(x,y) in R^{H_s x W_s} where each microlens tile decodes into one (s,t) sub-aperture view
physical_parameters_theta: Main lens focal length f, aperture N_f
MLA pitch p, number of microlenses H_m x W_m
MLA rotation angle theta_mla, sub-pixel offset (dx_mla, dy_mla)
Sensor bit depth, gain, read noise

W.regime: Well-posed when MLA is calibrated and scene lies within depth-of-field cone of each sub-aperture. Degrades at occlusion boundaries, specular highlights, and beyond the angular-resolution disparity limit; MLA misregistration couples spatial and angular dimensions.

C.solver_class: shear-sum refocus (analytical), epipolar-plane image (EPI) depth estimation, iterative LF super-resolution, learned (LFGAN, LFTransformer, DistgLF)
C.error_bound: |I_hat - I|_L2 <= C1 * sigma / sqrt(U*V) + C2 * mla_misregistration_px + C3 * aliasing_at_high_disparity
C.complexity: O(H * W * U * V) for refocus; O(U * V * H * W * log) for deep LF super-resolution
